candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; large positive values and feeds into Total income.
Liability; not a revenue flow item, so not appropriate for REVT.
Balancing adjustment to petroleum revenues rather than the core revenue line; can serve as fallback if main line missing.
Explicitly labeled as a balancing item; only useful as last-resort fallback if main revenue lines are missing.

variables.notes: Petroleum revenues is the clear top-line. Additional balancing lines included as lower-priority fallbacks per instructions.
Production costs likely represent COGS but are not present in the provided candidate list, so no allowed label can be selected.

candidates.why: This is operating income, not an overhead expense; should not be treated as SG&A.
Also operating income rather than SG&A expense; not appropriate for SG&A components.
Explicit overhead-type operating expenses; fits SG&A definition and excludes COGS and D&A.
Classic SG&A component covering administrative overhead costs.

variables.notes: Selected only expense-type overhead components; excluded income lines from SG&A per instructions.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; directly matches XRD definition.
Primary interest expense on debt; clear financing cost and suitable for XINT.
Generic interest expense line; when present it is the most direct XINT measure.
Interest component of lease liabilities; part of total interest expense.
Capitalized interest added to asset bases, not expensed; generally should be excluded from XINT.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of interest rate hedges (ineffectiveness)
candidates.why: Fair value hedge ineffectiveness, not pure interest expense; should not be primary XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest expense; valid component of interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not a P&L expense line; not suitable for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest-bearing loans and borrowings excluding financial lease
candidates.why: Also a liability balance; not an expense.
Accrued interest liability; not the period expense itself.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list: generic interest expense first, then specific debt and lease interest labels. Capitalized interest and hedge FV changes intentionally excluded.

candidates.why: Component of equity but not the total; should not be used for BE alone.
Total equity attributable to shareholders; close to BE but may exclude some hybrid elements.
Overall total equity; best single representation of book equity for BE.
Technical balancing line, not the equity total.
Balancing line, not the substantive equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item for the accounting equation; not pure equity.
Represents equity plus liabilities; not appropriate as book equity alone.

variables.notes: Total Equity is selected as the comprehensive book equity measure.
No minority interest / non-controlling interest line appears in the candidate list; treated as absent.
